[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 100000001 2
1 000000000 a
2 000000000 a
3 000000000 a
4 000000000 a
5 000000000 a
6 101010100 4
7 000000100 1
